purpose: Define the post-architecture-readiness execution order for private training, local inference canaries, dogfood learning, public calibration, and later Hive scaling without creating side lanes or weakening no-cheat boundaries.

lanes.title: Preflight Freeze
lanes.goal: Freeze the current source, roadmap, registry, and no-cheat state before any training run.
entry_criteria: workspace has no unreviewed source changes that affect training or inference
training data admission hard gates pass
exit_criteria: all hard no-cheat counters are zero
current public calibration state is known
training checkpoint and data manifest targets are selected
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Stop before training if registry, data admission, architecture readiness, or this plan gate is RED.
no_claims: does not claim model quality
does not claim public transfer
does not run training

lanes.title: Data And Context Manifest
lanes.goal: Materialize exact English and Python/JS-TS/HTML-CSS/Rust training rows into independent arm views plus a mixed dense-control view, with VCM context packets and complete lineage.
entry_criteria: teacher rows are admitted only by the distillation gate
allowed_inputs: high-quality appropriately licensed static model-derived rows with retained generation lineage
governed teacher-distillation rows accepted by verifier
VCM context packets with taint receipts
forbidden_inputs: public benchmark prompts as training rows
public benchmark tests or hidden tests
public benchmark solutions or answer templates
raw private user text by default
teacher proposals not accepted by the distillation gate
exit_criteria: training row manifest has exact row counts and provenance
heldout/private eval split is frozen
VCM context adequacy is sufficient or explicitly partial
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Quarantine any row family with public benchmark taint, missing provenance, or teacher gate failure.
no_claims: does not claim teacher output is runtime output
does not claim licensed public non-benchmark data is benchmark training

lanes.title: Private Training Smoke
lanes.goal: Run short MLX smokes for each independent language arm and the matched mixed dense control, proving separate optimizer/checkpoint lineage, VCM/context ABI, and no-cheat counters before longer rungs.
entry_criteria: MLX route readiness is GREEN but production route remains disabled
all five arm contracts and the dense-control digest target are recorded
allowed_inputs: private verifier labels attached after generation
VCM packets approved by context governor
forbidden_inputs: deterministic tool outputs as learned-generation targets
exit_criteria: each arm/control checkpoint artifact is written with a distinct digest and optimizer lineage
public training rows written equals zero
external inference calls equals zero
fallback/template/router/tool credit equals zero
loss and throughput are recorded
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Delete or quarantine checkpoint if any no-cheat counter is nonzero or checkpoint provenance is missing.
no_claims: loss improvement alone is not capability progress
smoke does not authorize public calibration
completed substrate smokes and transactional resume do not establish model capability

lanes.title: Bounded Private Training Rung
lanes.goal: Complete the frozen v8 five-arm MoECOT and matched 10.780M-active/12.500M-total dense controls unchanged, then publish their per-language exact-recovery diagnostic without treating target-string reproduction as a complete utility verdict.
entry_criteria: data manifest and heldout split are frozen
allowed_inputs: private residual categories: missing_semantic_update_value, type_handling, wrong_answer, missing_finalizer
governed residual-only teacher rows if distillation manifest becomes ready and both teacher-share caps remain satisfied
forbidden_inputs: hand-authored fixed update renderers counted as learned generation
structural adapters counted as learned generation
exit_criteria: arm-specific and mixed-control v8 exact-recovery diagnostics are published per language under both preregistered accounting views
exact recovery, syntax, serialization, loss, similarity, throughput, memory, optimizer positions, and cost are reported without utility overclaim
the unchanged rung is retained as a systems-canary result even if every functional numerator remains zero
candidate integrity remains GREEN
checkpoint size, load time, throughput, and memory are reported

adopted_architecture_repairs: family-disjoint claims now require independently verified transitive checkpoint-training lineage
configured heldout families are excluded before private rows can seed source or target vocabulary
semantic adaptation profiles no longer silently enable a holdout-family residual split
semantic profile/checkpoint ABI compatibility fails before optimizer work
specialist replay routing now forwards the complete decode ABI
rejected_model_interventions: the clean semantic adaptation emitted 14 integrity-clean candidates across the 24-row family-disjoint diagnostic but passed 0/24 behaviors
starvation DPO improved its preference objective but regressed emitted candidates from 14 to 0 and is not adopted
latest_diagnostic_disposition.current_wall: The v8 development rows expose prompt and target but no executable tests or complete functional verifier. English 1/128 exact and zero exact code are exact-recovery diagnostics, not a practical architecture verdict. Do not substitute templates, renderers, deterministic tools, route labels, syntax rates, LM loss, similarity, or preference-gap improvement for model-only functional behavior.
latest_diagnostic_disposition.next_allowed_step: Finish both dense controls unchanged and publish the frozen diagnostic. Before inspecting completed control outputs, freeze T4's architecture-neutral functional utility manifest; run unchanged checkpoints there before any practical route selection, confirmation spend, amplifier, scale decision, or public calibration.

lanes.rollback_or_stop: Do not promote if improvement is only syntax, nontrivial-return rate, lower LM loss, or wider fanout without behavior.
no_claims: does not claim production routing
does not claim public transfer
does not claim SymLiquid verdict

lanes.title: Private Functional Utility And Candidate Integrity
lanes.goal: Freeze and execute a source-disjoint, architecture-neutral functional utility qualification for English and every code language while preserving exact recovery as a separate diagnostic and independently auditing candidate integrity.
entry_criteria: the functional manifest is frozen before completed dense-control outputs are inspected
T3 produced unchanged checkpoints with clean provenance
candidate files, toolchain identities, rubrics, tests, and reports are replayable
allowed_inputs: blind English rubric and pairwise judgments
pinned Python, JS/TS, HTML/CSS, and Rust toolchain receipts
exit_criteria: English multi-turn utility is scored blind with rubric version and inter-rater agreement
Python and Rust compile/test results, JS/TS parse/typecheck/build/runtime results, and HTML/CSS DOM/accessibility/render results are reported per family
exact recovery and functional utility are separate channels and every language tail floor is visible
integrity mismatch count is zero or treated as negative evidence
pass-if-any, selected-pass, invalid, timeout, no-output, and accepted-output-per-second rates are reported
no deterministic tool or adapter result is counted as learned generation
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Block practical route promotion if integrity or blind-flow fails. If sparse and both dense controls are functionally zero across code, mark the 10.8M rung falsified and move to a data-supported 50M-100M scale proposal instead of another same-scale patch.
no_claims: does not turn tool-assisted success into model-only success
does not accept self-declared candidate provenance
does not treat exact target-string recovery as complete functional utility

lanes.title: Local Assisted Inference Canary
lanes.goal: Use the existing assistant runtime as an honest local canary with VCM, deterministic tools, planning, evidence refs, uncertainty, and dogfood feedback.
entry_criteria: assistant product lane gate is GREEN
model-only code generation wall is visible to the user
forbidden_inputs: external inference tokens served to user
raw private user text written as training rows by default
exit_criteria: answers cite evidence or uncertainty
accepted/missed/ignored/corrected/completed outcomes are captured
tool-assisted and model-only behavior remain separately labeled
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Disable or restrict any route that silently serves external tokens or overclaims model-only generation.
no_claims: does not claim ChatGPT-grade model-only inference
does not claim public benchmark competence

lanes.title: Dogfood Feedback To Training Rows
lanes.goal: Convert real use outcomes into governed metadata-first training pressure and procedural-memory candidates.
forbidden_inputs: raw private user text by default
exit_criteria: accepted/missed/ignored/corrected/completed counts are reported
admitted rows cite source events and privacy treatment
failed or ignored tasks create residual categories
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Quarantine any feedback row with raw private text or missing source-event provenance.
no_claims: does not claim dogfood metadata alone improves public transfer
does not claim raw private text training

lanes.title: Fresh Public Calibration Proposal
lanes.goal: Run a fresh frozen public calibration after a confirmation-qualified functional model change, then mine failures into private residual categories without training on public artifacts.
entry_criteria: T4 shows positive model-only functional utility and candidate integrity
surface slug is fresh and not consumed
allowed_inputs: public benchmark prompts for calibration execution only
public verifier results retained as calibration evidence
forbidden_inputs: public benchmark prompts as training rows
public tests or hidden tests as training rows
public solutions, traces, or answer templates as training rows
exit_criteria: per-card scores are reported
failure categories are mined into private-only residual plan
public artifacts remain excluded from training
surface is marked consumed
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Stop if proposal gate refuses the surface, if contamination checks fail, or if the run would repeat an exact consumed surface.
no_claims: public calibration is measurement, not training
a single public run does not prove general ASI capability

lanes.title: Hive Fleet Training Scaleout
lanes.goal: Scale training across trusted Hive nodes only after local training/inference contracts are clean and live peers are reachable.
entry_criteria: resource routes are current per node
exit_criteria: each worker chunk has input artifact, output artifact, score, owner node, backend, and merge result
stale leases recover without stranding work
artifact sync preserves provenance
lanes.rollback_or_stop: Keep scaleout disabled while the current trusted Windows coordinator is unreachable from this Mac.
no_claims: does not claim distributed work is proven while peers are unreachable
does not authorize arbitrary remote execution

success_metrics.private_semantic_behavior_delta: must improve over frozen baseline before promotion or public calibration
success_metrics.teacher_share_metric: report accepted-row and optimizer-sampling shares every cycle; cap at 0.10 and 0.02 respectively and trend both toward zero as licensed, dogfood, and verified self-generated data improve
success_metrics.assistant_usefulness: accepted/completed dogfood outcomes increase while missed/ignored residuals are mined
success_metrics.inference_latency_and_memory: reported separately for assisted local runtime and model-only routes
success_metrics.mlx_route_state: mechanically ready, production disabled until private behavior quality is positive
success_metrics.public_calibration_state: fresh frozen measurement only, exact consumed reruns refused

next_concrete_sequence: Preserve the immutable v8 data, tokenizer, seed, supervision, development, confirmation, and verifier contract.
Finish the in-flight T3 active-parameter dense control, then the total-parameter dense control through transactional checkpoints.
Run T4 direct per-language evaluation for both controls and publish MoECOT-versus-dense results under both preregistered accounting views.
Select the practical architecture from the frozen Pareto verdict; do not tune from interim or aggregate-only results.
Spend each confirmation split once on the selected unchanged implementation and execute a registry replacement transaction only if it qualifies.
Qualify VCM, STS, search, preference/RL, and fast generation only after behavior-positive direct generation, each with equal-budget mechanism-removed controls.
Run T5/T6 real-use feedback on the qualified local route; propose T7 only after a material private model improvement.
